corpus.content: Attempted to list files in /root, failed with permission denied.
Never attempt to read files in /root. Always use /tmp for scratch files.
The project uses uv instead of pip for Python dependencies. Always use uv pip install.
Built Rust project successfully using cargo build --release.
The frontend React app requires npm run dev to start the development server, but it must be run with NODE_ENV=development.
Do not delete any .git folders. We need to preserve project history.
Failed to connect to postgres on localhost:5432. Realized database port was 5433.
PostgreSQL in this environment runs on port 5433, not 5432.
Use ripgrep (rg) for searching instead of grep for better performance.
Deployed the staging environment, deployment took 45 seconds.

scenarios.query: How should I add new packages for the python script?
scenarios.description: Semantic query avoiding exact keywords like 'install', 'pip', 'uv'.
Semantic query using 'DB' and 'listening' instead of 'PostgreSQL' and 'port'.
